meta.notes: Icelandic household electricity — average for "5000–15000 kWh" annual consumption, all taxes and fees included, from Statistics Iceland (Hagstofa), table IDN02303. 19.12 ISK/kWh. Licensed CC BY 4.0 — attribute Statistics Iceland. A statistical average, not a shoppable plan. Iceland's hydro/geothermal market is stable; this is the latest published period (2022H1).
